creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Please

For as long as sysutils/lscpu will be ignored on aarch64: 

* can sysutils/plasma5-kinfocenter be set to not have the 
  runtime dependency upon sysutils/lscpu when building on aarch64? 

<https://www.freshports.org/sysutils/plasma5-kinfocenter/#config>

> No options to configure

zi@ FYI: 

NetBSD Big Endian ARM64 kind of works · Issue #11 · NanXiao/lscpu
<https://github.com/NanXiao/lscpu/issues/11>

‒ for FreeBSD, is a separate issue appropriate?

Context
=======

Installing KDE5 on aarch64 | The FreeBSD Forums
<https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/85251/>

– in particular, <https://forums.freebsd.org/posts/568183>.
